notifications.prayerTestBody: This is how prayer alerts will appear.
notifications.readingPlanBody: Keep your Quran plan active today with a short reading session.
notifications.readingPlanTestBody: Open the app and complete your reading plan for today.

localizationSetup.title: Set up your reading experience
localizationSetup.subtitle: Choose app language and Quran display preferences.
localizationSetup.stepLanguageBody: This controls navigation, settings, prayer labels, and notifications.
localizationSetup.stepModeBody: You can change this later in settings.
localizationSetup.stepTranslationBody: Quran content language stays separate from the app interface.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Typography and preferences.
settings.languageRegionSubtitle: App language, region, and calendar preferences.
settings.notificationsSubtitle: Manage reminders, prayer times, and adhan sound.
settings.cloudSubtitle: Sync bookmarks and favorites across devices.
settings.translationLanguageSubtitle: Choose the Quran translation language independently from the app language.
settings.showTransliterationSubtitle: Display pronunciation guidance between Arabic and translation.
settings.tafsirLanguageSubtitle: Choose the language used for tafsir content.
settings.appLanguageSubtitle: Navigation, buttons, settings, and notifications follow this language.
settings.verseLayoutSubtitle: Choose how verses are displayed. Mushaf shows a printed-page style.
settings.translationArabicDatasetNote: Arabic uses the original Quran text instead of a separate translation dataset.

surah.loadErrorBody: Check your connection and try again.
surah.offlineCopyBody: Showing downloaded text. Connect to update.
surah.mushafViewBody: Printed-page style. Tap any verse to bookmark, favorite, or open tafsir.
surah.chooseVerseAction: Choose an action for this verse.

readingPlan.title: Reading Plan
readingPlan.subtitle: Set plan duration and daily reminder.
readingPlan.startPrompt: Start a guided reading plan and track completion as you read each day.
readingPlan.catchUpSuggestion: Catch-up suggestion: complete {{count}} extra day this week to return on track.
readingPlan.catchUpSuggestion_other: Catch-up suggestion: complete {{count}} extra days this week to return on track.
readingPlan.weeklyReviewSummary: {{completed}} days completed in the last 7 days. {{missed}} missed.
readingPlan.weeklyCatchUpSuffix: · Catch-up: complete {{count}} extra day this week.
readingPlan.weeklyCatchUpSuffix_other: · Catch-up: complete {{count}} extra days this week.
readingPlan.weeklyOnTargetSuffix: · You are on target this week.
readingPlan.milestonesEmpty: Keep reading daily to unlock milestones and badges.
readingPlan.planHistoryEmpty: Finished or reset plans will appear here.
readingPlan.dailyReminderBody: Get a reminder notification to complete your plan.
readingPlan.alertStartPlanBody: Enable a reading plan before scheduling reminders.
readingPlan.alertPermissionBody: Enable notifications to receive reading plan reminders.
readingPlan.alertPermissionTestBody: Enable notifications to send a test.
readingPlan.alertScheduledBody: Reading plan reminders are set. ({{count}} upcoming)

quran.title: Quran
quran.subtitle: Browse Surahs, search quickly, and return to your last reading place.
quran.continueEmpty: Start any Surah and your progress will appear here for quick return later.
quran.searchHint: Search Surahs, ayah references, or meanings
quran.loadSurahListTitle: We could not load the Surah list
quran.loadSurahListBody: Check your connection and try again. Once the list loads, you can search, continue reading, or jump into any Surah.

search.title: Search
search.subtitle: Find verses by keyword, Surah, or verse number.
search.tipsBody:
- Use keywords like "mercy"
- Jump to an ayah like "2:255"
search.failedBody: Check your connection and try again.
search.noResultsBody: Try different keywords or jump using a verse number like "2:255".

study.title: Study
study.subtitle: Reflect, explore, and understand with respectful study tools.
study.hubBody: Use tafsir, translation, and AI summaries together. AI responses are assistive and should never replace authentic tafsir.
study.explainAyahBody: Open any verse to view tafsir and generate a simplified summary with context.
study.searchMeaningBody: Look for a verse using a phrase, topic, or idea and jump into the reader.
study.compareBody: Read translation, tafsir, and AI-assisted notes together without leaving the study flow.
study.nextStepBody: Start from the Quran tab, open a verse, and use the tafsir sheet. That gives the cleanest path into detailed study without leaving the reading flow.
study.comingSoonTitle: More guided study tools are coming
study.comingSoonBody: We will expand this area with surah themes, verse grouping, and deeper study helpers without turning the app into a noisy chat interface.

discover.title: Discover
discover.subtitle: Nearby Islamic updates, places, and useful community information.
discover.mosquesBody: Mosques, Jumu'ah locations, and prayer-related places will appear here once location-based discovery is enabled.
discover.classesBody: Verified classes, circles, and local events can live here without overwhelming the daily-use flow.
discover.calendarBody: Important dates, seasonal reminders, and community announcements can be surfaced here in a calm format.
discover.emptyTitle: Nearby Islamic updates will appear here
discover.emptyBody: We will show local mosques, classes, Jumu'ah locations, and community updates here when available.

prayers.manualLocationError: Set a manual city and country in Prayer Alerts before using manual location.
prayers.bellHint: Bell toggles control each prayer alert.
prayers.qiblaWithHeading: Turn slowly until the Kaaba marker aligns with the top of your phone.
prayers.qiblaSimulatorHint: Compass heading may not be available on simulators.
prayers.emptyBody: Tap refresh to load your location.

home.setPrayerLocation: Set prayer location to load times
home.continueReadingEmpty: Open any Surah and your last reading place will appear here.
home.translationUnavailable: Translation not available for the current setup.
home.todaysVerseUnavailableTitle: Today's verse is unavailable right now
home.todaysVerseUnavailableBody: We could not load the verse content yet. You can still continue reading or browse the Quran.
home.noRecitationBody: Start a recitation from any Surah and you will be able to resume it here.
home.dailyReflectionBody: Return with a calm heart, even if today's reading is brief. Small, steady engagement is more valuable than a rushed session.
